sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current: bottom charcoal at cols 10-13, top charcoal at col 63 (1px)
# Try moving bottom charcoal to cols 18-21 (2 clicks right)
print("Moving bottom charcoal right...")
for i in range(2):
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 46, 'col': 2}])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c':
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            print(f"  After click {i+1}: charcoal cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, {n['pixels']}px")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        print("  LEVEL COMPLETED!")
        break

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nCurrent state:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('c', 'N'):
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
